name: bpmn-canvas
description: BPMN Canvas — independent repo with its own BFF (:3002) and MFE (:5175). bpmn-js renders BPMN 2.0 diagrams. The BFF simulates workflow execution and streams step transitions via SSE and WebSocket. qiankun exposes the MFE to the meta-shell.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BFF,MFE -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:bff" "npm run dev:mfe"
